findings.description: Two RST ref targets in s2 are listed without the 'WebView_' prefix — 'ConfirmationPageTag' and 'IgnoreConfirmationTag' — while every other equivalent hint in the same section uses the full 'WebView_Xxx' form (e.g. 'WebView_ForInputPageTag', 'WebView_RadioButtonsTag'). A query using the canonical name 'WebView_ConfirmationPageTag' or 'WebView_IgnoreConfirmationTag' would not match these hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST ref targets: :ref:`WebView_ConfirmationPageTag` and :ref:`WebView_IgnoreConfirmationTag`. All other tags in the same section are represented in hints as 'WebView_RadioButtonsTag', 'WebView_CheckboxesTag', etc.
